parameters.query: UPDATE maintenance_requests SET status = 'closed', updated_at = NOW() WHERE '{{ $json.resolveTicket }}' = 'true' AND ticket_id = (SELECT ticket_id FROM maintenance_requests WHERE phone LIKE '%' || RIGHT('{{ $json.phone }}', 10) || '%' AND status = 'open' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1) RETURNING ticket_id, status

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ messaging_product: 'whatsapp', to: ($json.phone), type: 'text', text: { body: ($json.message) } }) }}

parameters.query: INSERT INTO messages (chat_id, ticket_id, sender, message_text, channel, created_at) SELECT phone, ticket_id, 'system', 'Ticket ' || ticket_id || ' has been closed.', channel, NOW() FROM maintenance_requests WHERE ticket_id = '{{ $('Build Confirmation').item.json.ticketId }}' AND '{{ $('Build Confirmation').item.json.resolveTicket }}' = 'true' RETURNING id;
INSERT INTO pending_media (chat_id, file_id, status) VALUES ('{{ $json.senderPhone }}', '{{ $json.mediaId }}', 'pending') RETURNING *

INSERT INTO messages (chat_id, sender, message_text, channel, external_message_id, created_at) VALUES ('{{ $("Parse Meta Message").item.json.senderPhone }}', (SELECT COALESCE(name, 'Tenant') FROM tenants WHERE phone LIKE '%' || RIGHT('{{ $("Parse Meta Message").item.json.senderPhone }}', 10) || '%' LIMIT 1), '{{ ($('Parse Meta Message').item.json.text || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}', 'whatsapp', 'wa_{{ $("Parse Meta Message").item.json.messageId }}', NOW()) ON CONFLICT (external_message_id) WHERE external_message_id != '' DO NOTHING RETURNING *

SELECT ticket_id, keywords, category FROM maintenance_requests WHERE phone LIKE '%' || RIGHT('{{ $('Parse Meta Message').item.json.senderPhone }}', 10) || '%' AND status NOT IN ('closed', 'resolved') ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 5
UPDATE pending_media SET ticket_id = '{{ $json.mediaTicketId }}', category = '{{ $json.mediaTicketId }}', status = 'categorized' WHERE id::text LIKE '%{{ $json.mediaShortId }}' RETURNING *
UPDATE pending_media SET file_url = '{{ $json.url }}', status = 'uploaded' WHERE id = '{{ $json.pendingId }}' RETURNING id, file_url, chat_id

UPDATE messages SET media = '{"type":"image","url":"{{ $("Download WA Media").item.json.url }}"}', ticket_id = '{{ $("Handle WA Callback").item.json.mediaTicketId }}' WHERE id = (  SELECT id FROM messages  WHERE chat_id::text = '{{ $("Update WA Pending").item.json.chat_id }}'  AND (message_text IS NULL OR message_text = '')  AND sender NOT IN ('bot', 'system', 'owner')  AND ticket_id IS NULL  ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1) RETURNING id

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ messaging_product: 'whatsapp', to: ($('Handle WA Callback').item.json.phone), type: 'text', text: { body: ('Got it! Photo saved to ticket ' + $('Handle WA Callback').item.json.mediaTicketId + '.') } }) }}

parameters.query:
UPDATE messages SET 
  media = json_build_object('type', split_part('{{ $("Download WA Media").item.json.mimeType }}', '/', 1), 'url', '{{ $("Download WA Media").item.json.url }}')::text,
  ticket_id = (SELECT ticket_id FROM maintenance_requests WHERE phone LIKE '%' || RIGHT('{{ $("Parse Meta Message").item.json.senderPhone }}', 10) || '%' AND status NOT IN ('closed', 'resolved') ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1)
WHERE external_message_id = 'wa_{{ $("Parse Meta Message").item.json.messageId }}' RETURNING id

UPDATE messages SET ticket_id = '{{ $json.mediaTicketId }}' WHERE chat_id::text = '{{ $json.phone }}' AND (message_text IS NULL OR message_text = '') AND sender NOT IN ('bot', 'system', 'owner') AND ticket_id IS NULL ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1 RETURNING id
